'''lakodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamelworks|enamelworks]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamelworks|enamelworks]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lakodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lækedheth|lækedheth]] || [[word:lækedhej|lækedhej]] || [[word:lækedhesh|lækedhesh]] || [[word:lækedhe|lækedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lakokodhoth|lakokodhoth]] || [[word:lakokodhoj|lakokodhoj]] || [[word:lakokodhosh|lakokodhosh]] || [[word:lakokodho|lakokodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lakodhoth|lakodhoth]] || [[word:lakodhoj|lakodhoj]] || [[word:lakodhosh|lakodhosh]] || [[word:lakodho|lakodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lakofdhoth|lakofdhoth]] || [[word:lakofdhoj|lakofdhoj]] || [[word:lakofdhosh|lakofdhosh]] || [[word:lakofdhof|lakofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lakodhotho|lakodhotho]] || [[word:lakodhojo|lakodhojo]] || [[word:lakodhosho|lakodhosho]] || [[word:lakodhoko|lakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lakodhoth|lakodhoth]] || [[word:lakodhoj|lakodhoj]] || [[word:lakodhosh|lakodhosh]] || [[word:lakodho|lakodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lakodhothol|lakodhothol]] || [[word:lakodhojol|lakodhojol]] || [[word:lakodhoshol|lakodhoshol]] || [[word:lakodhokol|lakodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lakodhothotho|lakodhothotho]] || [[word:lakodhojojo|lakodhojojo]] || [[word:lakodhoshosho|lakodhoshosho]] || [[word:lakodhoko|lakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lakodhothon|lakodhothon]] || [[word:lakodhojon|lakodhojon]] || [[word:lakodhoshon|lakodhoshon]] || [[word:lakodhokon|lakodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lakodhothoro|lakodhothoro]] || [[word:lakodhojoro|lakodhojoro]] || [[word:lakodhoshoro|lakodhoshoro]] || [[word:lakodhokoro|lakodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
